info.title: Freshservice API
info.description: Freshservice is an IT service management (ITSM) platform. This API provides programmatic access to manage tickets, problems, changes, releases, assets, agents, requesters, and more.

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return tickets updated since this timestamp

post.summary: Add a note to a ticket

get.summary: List time entries for a ticket

post.summary: Create a time entry for a ticket
Create a task for a ticket

basicAuth.description: Use your API key as the username and 'X' as the password
